name: Accounts, Tenancy & Tenant-Scoped Knowledge API
objective: Introduce users/tenants/projects with signup/login/session auth and API credentials; scope the knowledge API (write/read/search) per tenant; seed the operator's own tenant and migrate the live knowledge.hi2vi.com corpus in as tenant #1

review.note: S1-S6+F1 validated together: 65 legacy + one consolidated ephemeral tenant-mode E2E (auth/app/api/isolation 40/40, onboarding_smoke PASS pre+post disposable-DB rebuild = hard coupling #1, seed idempotent, docs/ re-stamped with tenant #1 UUID, F1 mixed-case master bearer resolves). Frozen POST /api/documents contract + single-worker + tenant-#1 zero-change all hold; D6 deferred, plugin/self-host untouched. Consolidated 7 doc versions: architecture v0009, backend v0005, data v0006, api v0007, security v0006, operations v0011, decisions v0011. Non-blocking: filed a deferred tenants/ off-box backup job.
